title: Compact privilege to practice telehealth
doc_html:
§1137. Compact privilege to practice telehealth

            A. Member states shall recognize the right of a licensed professional counselor, licensed by a home state in accordance with R.S. 37:1133 and under rules promulgated by the commission, to practice professional counseling in any member state via telehealth under a privilege to practice as provided in the compact and rules promulgated by the commission.

            B. A licensee providing professional counseling services in a remote state under the privilege to practice shall adhere to the laws and regulations of the remote state.

            Acts 2022, No. 341, §1.
doc_text:
§1137.  Compact privilege to practice telehealth
A.  Member states shall recognize the right of a licensed professional counselor,
licensed by a home state in accordance with R.S. 37:1133 and under rules promulgated by
the commission, to practice professional counseling in any member state via telehealth under
a privilege to practice as provided in the compact and rules promulgated by the commission.
B.  A licensee providing  professional counseling services in a remote state under the
privilege to practice shall adhere to the laws and regulations of the remote state.
Acts 2022, No. 341, §1.
